title: Beta+
description: A Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 mod that expands and improves the beta experience.
body:
# Beta+ Minecraft Mod (Beta 1.7.3)
## This mod is currently in beta 1.7.3.
I chose the name Beta+ because it is made specifically for Minecraft Beta, and it will add many new features over time.
### Project name is written ‘betapluss’ for availability reasons; it refers to Beta+

## How to install:
1) Install Prism Launcher
2) Create a Beta 1.7.3 instance
3) Open the instance settings
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19bb03369c05fab5d0213e0ee8462bd4d780da02.png)
4) Replace or add minecraft.jar
4) Select this mod
5) Finish installation and play !

## ⚠️ Java 8 is required
